title: Water leakage in bathroom ceiling
description: There is continuous water seepage from the bathroom ceiling, likely from the flat above. The paint is peeling off and there is a musty smell. This has been going on for 2 weeks now.

timeline.note: Plumber assigned, inspection scheduled for April 4

title: Noisy neighbors – Late night disturbance
description: The flat above (A-301) plays loud music past midnight regularly, especially on weekends. Have requested them personally but no improvement. Need management intervention.

title: Broken gate at Block C entrance
description: The automatic gate at Block C entrance has been malfunctioning for the past week. It gets stuck halfway and makes a grinding noise. Security concerns as it stays open at night.

timeline.note: Gate repair vendor contacted, parts ordered

title: Stray dogs entering premises
description: Stray dogs have been entering the apartment complex through the back gate. They leave a mess in the garden area and are sometimes aggressive. Need to fix the back gate gap.

timeline.note: Back gate inspection done, gap identified
Gate gap sealed, wire mesh installed. Monitoring for a week.

title: Gym equipment not working
description: The treadmill (#3) and one of the elliptical machines in the gym have been out of order. The display on the treadmill is blank. The elliptical has a squeaking sound.

title: Parking spot occupied by unknown vehicle
description: My allotted parking spot C-12 has been consistently occupied by a white Hyundai Creta (KA01XY9999) that doesn't belong to our block. This has been happening daily for the past 5 days.

timeline.note: Vehicle owner identified – Block D resident. Notified.
Vehicle moved to correct spot. Owner warned.

title: Lift getting stuck between floors
description: Block B elevator has been getting stuck between 3rd and 4th floor intermittently. Happened to me twice this week. Very concerning for safety, especially for elderly residents.

timeline.note: Elevator company notified. Emergency inspection scheduled for today.
